title: Mansaf: Middle Eastern Lamb Stew
description: A traditional Middle Eastern dish from Jordan, Mansaf is a flavorful lamb stew made with tender meat and served with rice and pine nuts.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Brown the lamb shoulder on all sides.
Add onions and garlic to the pot and sauté until softened.
Add middle eastern spices and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in beef broth, cover the pot, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 hours or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in pine nuts and season with salt and black pepper.
Serve Mansaf with rice and garnish with additional pine nuts if desired.
